title: Fear Garden — Chapter 3: The Cold Room Contract
description: Chapter 3 of the Fear Garden saga. The murder moves behind the bar, where a fake vendor contract connects the Root Ledger to a planned Beer Garden expansion.

answerKey.method: Triggered a locked cooler CO2 leak in the side prep room and delayed the alarm
answerKey.motive: To keep Simone from revealing Janelle’s fake vendor contract for the garden expansion
answerKey.keyEvidence: Cooler alarm delay, vendor contract draft, and janelle’s service-room badge swipe
answerKey.explanation: Janelle Price had the access, timing, and motive. The proof path combines cooler alarm delay, vendor contract draft, and Janelle’s service-room badge swipe with the failed statement: Janelle said she was checking wristbands outside. The cooler-room death proves the Root Ledger has become an expansion pipeline, not just a staff fraud file.
answerKey.sagaConnection: The cooler-room death proves the Root Ledger has become an expansion pipeline, not just a staff fraud file.
answerKey.chapterRevealHook: Janelle killed to protect her fake vendor contract, but the contract trail points past her. The expansion money is moving through a shell company with a manager-level signature.

phone.title: Phone Evidence 1
phone.text: Simone Hart missed two calls from Janelle Price before the garden music cut out. This clue belongs to Chapter 3: The Cold Room Contract.

phone.title: Phone Evidence 2
phone.text: A final call lasted eleven seconds as Simone moved toward the side corridor.

messages.title: Messages Evidence 1
messages.text: Simone texted Janelle: “We talk tonight. I saw the numbers.” This clue belongs to Chapter 3: The Cold Room Contract.

messages.title: Messages Evidence 2
messages.text: Janelle replied: “Not at the bar. Meet by the garden gate.”

maps.title: Maps Evidence 1
maps.text: Simone’s phone pinged near the patio garden path at 8:07 PM. This clue belongs to Chapter 3: The Cold Room Contract.

maps.title: Maps Evidence 2
maps.text: Janelle’s device appears nearby during the same short window.

bank.title: Bank Evidence 1
bank.text: A Beer Garden event ledger shows a suspicious private payout connected to keep simone from revealing janelle’s fake vendor contract for the garden expansion. This clue belongs to Chapter 3: The Cold Room Contract.

openingNarration: Detectives, welcome back to Fear Garden at Mid City Beer Garden in Baton Rouge, Louisiana. This is Chapter 3: The Cold Room Contract, built for Junior Detective. Fear Garden is no longer a set of separate cases. It is one continuing story that grows darker and more elaborate with every chapter. The fake vendor account hinted at in Chapter 2 now appears as a full contract draft connected to the expansion project. Tonight's investigation focuses on Simone Laurent. The investigation becomes more layered. Players must compare badge swipes, alarm delays, contract drafts, and motive evidence to separate local greed from the larger conspiracy. Study every app carefully. Earlier details may return with new meaning, and the Root Ledger thread is now part of the case foundation.
revealScript: Case revealed. Chapter 3: The Cold Room Contract is closed. The culprit was Janelle Price. The method: Triggered a locked cooler CO2 leak in the side prep room and delayed the alarm. The motive: To keep Simone from revealing Janelle’s fake vendor contract for the garden expansion. The proof: Cooler alarm delay, vendor contract draft, and janelle’s service-room badge swipe. Janelle killed to protect her fake vendor contract, but the contract trail points past her. The expansion money is moving through a shell company with a manager-level signature.

options.label: A normal spilled pint near the stage

cooler alarm was delayed three minutes
